  1. Trier /

  3. Innenstadt (Old Town)

Trier · District

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Trier's Innenstadt is both a concentration of landmarks and a living pedestrian zone. From the Roman gate Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) down Simeonstrasse to the Hauptmarkt (the main market square), and from there on to the Cathedral of St. Peter and the Liebfrauenkirche (Church of Our Lady). Fountains, patrician townhouses, sidewalk cafes, and four UNESCO sites all within a few hundred meters.

UNESCORoemerFussgaengerzone

Sights in Innenstadt (Old Town)

Antike
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Porta Nigra (the Black Gate)

The Black Gate, Trier's landmark and the best-preserved Roman city gate north of the Alps.

From 4 €
Kirche
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Trier Cathedral (Dom St. Peter)

Germany's oldest bishop's church. Home to the Holy Robe, the cathedral treasury, and Romanesque mass right on the Hauptmarkt (the main market square).

Free admission
Kirche
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Liebfrauenkirche (Church of Our Lady)

One of the oldest Gothic churches in Germany, right next to the cathedral.

Free admission
Antike
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Konstantinbasilika (Basilica of Constantine)

The ancient throne hall of Emperor Constantine, today the city's main Protestant church. A 27 m high hall with no internal supports.

Free admission
Antike
UNESCO

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Roman Bridge (Römerbrücke)

The oldest bridge in Germany north of the Alps. Its Roman piers date to 144 AD.

Free admission
Markt

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hauptmarkt (the main market square) with Market Cross

Trier's market square since 958. The Steipe, Petrusbrunnen fountain, Market Cross, and Rotes Haus all stand here.

Free admission
Wahrzeichen

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Electoral Palace (Kurfürstliches Palais)

A pink Rococo palace between the Basilica of Constantine and the palace gardens. One of the finest Rococo palaces in Germany.

Free admission
Wahrzeichen

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Dreikönigenhaus (House of the Three Magi)

A medieval residential tower on the Simeonstrasse. Entrance on the first floor, a typical defensive house.

Free admission
Museum

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Rheinisches Landesmuseum (Rhineland State Museum)

One of Europe's most important museums of antiquity. Mosaics, gold coins, and the model of Roman Trier.

From 8 €
Museum

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Stadtmuseum Simeonstift (Simeonstift City Museum)

City history right next to the Porta Nigra. Includes a Romanesque cloister.

From 5 €
Museum

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Museum am Dom (Cathedral Museum)

The cathedral treasury, early Christian finds, and a calm curatorial setting next to the cathedral.

From 3.5 €
Museum

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Karl Marx House

Karl Marx's birthplace (1818). Permanent exhibition on his life, work, and influence.

From 5 €
Museum

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Trier Toy Museum (Spielzeugmuseum)

Three floors of toys from 1900 to today. A family favorite right on the Hauptmarkt.

From 5 €
Park

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Moselle Promenade

Riverside path between Zurlauben and the Roman Bridge. The best walking stretch, with boat docks and restaurants.

Free admission

Hotels in Innenstadt (Old Town)

★★★★
Guest favourite

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Park Plaza Trier

Comfortable 4-star hotel on the Kornmarkt, three minutes from the Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) and the cathedral.

⭐ 8.6/10 · 2104 reviews From 119 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Mercure Hotel Trier Porta Nigra

4-star hotel right next to the Porta Nigra. The location lives up to the name.

⭐ 8.4/10 · 1872 reviews From 109 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Best Western Plus Hotel Trier City

Modern 4-star hotel on the edge of the old town. Fresh rooms, breakfast buffet, fitness room.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 1290 reviews From 99 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Domhotel Trier

Family-run 4-star hotel directly on the Hauptmarkt (the main market square). Classic Trier charm.

⭐ 8.7/10 · 980 reviews From 115 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel Roemischer Kaiser

Traditional house right next to the Porta Nigra. Cozy, regional, no frills.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 850 reviews From 110 €
★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel zur Glocke

Small city hotel on Glockenstrasse. Personally run, fair prices, central location.

⭐ 8.4/10 · 720 reviews From 79 €
★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Aurelius am Dom

Modern boutique hotel right behind the cathedral. Clean lines, fair prices, prime location.

⭐ 8.6/10 · 590 reviews From 89 €
★★
Guest favourite

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hostel Hille

Budget address with dorms and private rooms, five minutes on foot from the Porta Nigra.

⭐ 8.4/10 · 1980 reviews From 32 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel Deutscher Hof

Long-established address on the southern edge of the old town. Solid 4-star comfort, restaurant, bar.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 1340 reviews From 95 €

Erlebnisse von GetYourGuide

Stadtführungen durch die Altstadt

Geführte Rundgänge durch die Innenstadt zeigen Porta Nigra, Hauptmarkt und Dom auf einem Weg.

* Affiliate-Link. Buchung über GetYourGuide, für dich keine Mehrkosten, wir erhalten eine Provision.

Hotel-Karte

Hotels in Innenstadt (Old Town) - live map

Live prices via Booking. Zoom in, tap a pin, book.

Restaurants in Innenstadt (Old Town)

Mediterranean-Regional
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Schlemmereule

Set in the cathedral cellar on the Domfreihof. Mediterranean accents on a regional foundation.

Bistro
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bagatelle

Charming bistro with a French slant on Zuckerbergstraße.

Regional / Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Weinstube Kesselstatt

Classic wine tavern on Liebfrauenplatz. Regional cooking, Mosel wines, and a wonderful terrace.

Regional / Roman
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Zum Domstein

Restaurant built over a Roman wine press. Regional cuisine plus historical Roman menus.

Regional
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Kartoffelkiste

A Trier classic built around potato dishes. Family-friendly, generous portions, cozy.

Modern Regional
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Pfeffermühle

Restaurant with a modern take on Moselle cuisine in the Zurlauben fishermen's quarter.

Modern
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bei Joh und Otto

Young restaurant with modern cuisine, a short menu, and a thoughtful wine selection.

Italian
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Ristorante L'Osteria

Italian chain serving oversized pizzas on the Hauptmarkt. Reliable and family-friendly.

Italian
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Ristorante La Bottega

Ambitious Italian on Glockenstraße. Seasonal menu and a good wine list.

Italian
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Pizzeria Donna Margherita

Small pizzeria on Sichelstraße. Wood-fired Neapolitan pizza at fair prices.

Italian
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Vapiano Trier

Italian chain with live-cooking stations on the Viehmarkt.

Japanese / Sushi
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Akito Sushi

Sushi spot on Bruchhausenstraße. Fresh fish, fair prices, delivery available.

Vietnamese
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bambus

Small Vietnamese restaurant. Pho, bun bo nam bo, and summer rolls.

Thai
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Saigon

Thai cuisine on Brückenstraße. Curries, glass noodles, and heat to order.

Bistro
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bistro Quo Vadis

Bistro with a rotating daily menu and a solid wine list on Stockplatz.

Café & Bistro
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Lieblingsstube

Café-bistro serving breakfast all day. Homemade cakes and a small hot menu.

Burgers
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Burgerlich

Burger spot offering several patty options, a fries menu, and craft beer.

Modern
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Tabula Rasa

Young, modern restaurant with rotating menus and bold flavors.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
